zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg於1367年出生在德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 斯坦波格易時，他的父親Heinrich II von Holstein50歲，母親Ingeborg of Mecklenburg31歲。他於1395年與Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg在德國尼德薩辛布勞恩史維布勞恩史維結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1404年在德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 史萊斯維享年37歲，埋葬在德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 斯坦波格易。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg于1367年出生在德国史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 斯坦波格易时，他的父亲Heinrich II von Holstein50岁，母亲Ingeborg of Mecklenburg31岁。他于1395年与Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg在德国尼德薩辛布勞恩史維布勞恩史維结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1404年在德国史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 史萊斯維享年37岁，埋葬在德国史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 斯坦波格易。

nameMeanings.name: Gerhard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg was born in 1367, in Itzehoe, Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany, his father, Heinrich II von Holstein, was 50 and his mother, Ingeborg of Mecklenburg, was 31. He married Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg in 1395, in Braunschweig, Brunswick, Lower Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1404, in Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany, at the age of 37, and was buried in Itzehoe, Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg est né en 1367, à Itzehoe, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Allemagne, son père, Heinrich II von Holstein, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Ingeborg of Mecklenburg, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg en 1395, à Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1404, à Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Allemagne, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Itzehoe, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg 1367 in Itzehoe, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Heinrich II von Holstein 50 und seine Mutter Ingeborg of Mecklenburg 31. Er hat 1395 in Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Deutschland Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1404 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland und wurde in Itzehoe, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg(이)가 1367년 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 스타인버그 잇츠호에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heinrich II von Holstein(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Ingeborg of Mecklenburg(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1395년 독일 니더작센 브라슈위그 브라슈위그에서 Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1404년 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 슐레스위그에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 스타인버그 잇츠호에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg nasceu em 1367, em Itzehoe, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemanha, seu pai, Heinrich II von Holstein, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Ingeborg of Mecklenburg, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg em 1395, em Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1404, em Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemanha, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Itzehoe, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg родился в 1367 г. в местности ицэо, крис стинбург, щлесвиг-холстин, Германия, его отцу по имени Heinrich II von Holstein было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Ingeborg of Mecklenburg, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg в 1395 г. в местности браунщвиг, браунщвиг, ниедирсачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1404 г. в местности крис щлесвиг, щлесвиг-холстин, Германия в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности ицэо, крис стинбург, щлесвиг-холстин, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg nació en 1367, en Itzehoe, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemania, su papá, Heinrich II von Holstein, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Ingeborg of Mecklenburg, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg en 1395, en Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1404, en Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemania, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Itzehoe, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemania.
